rationale: Refactored fetch-result enrichment to compute operator_summary once with explicit precedence: collected stdout/result summary first, completed-session assistant text only as fallback.
Review summary only; the actionable child comment is tracked separately.
Gated managed-session lastAssistantText enrichment to completed successful runs and added a failed-run regression test proving stale assistant text is not copied.
Automated review wrapper only; the actionable child comment is tracked separately.
